revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Crlf2%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == This template adds a true carriage return and line feed. It is useful in markup when wikimarkup that must start on a new line such as #, * or ; is used in a table or template. For example, the {{tl|markup}} template creates a table: {{markup|title=Including {{code|* Text}} causes the {{code|*}} bullet markup to not be parsed | * Text |* Text }} {{markup|title=Including {{tag|br|s}} parses the bullet markup, but adds a blank line |
* Text |
* Text }} {{markup|title=Using {{tl|crlf2}} parses the bullet markup without extra white space |{{crlf2}} * Text |{{crlf2}} * Text }} == See also == {{Sandbox other|| [[no:Mal:Crlf2]] }} [[Category:Line-handling templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == This template adds a true carriage return and line feed. It is useful in markup when wikimarkup that must start on a new line such as #, * or ; is used in a table or template. For example, the {{tl|markup}} template creates a table: {{markup|title=Including {{code|* Text}} causes the {{code|*}} bullet markup to not be parsed | * Text |* Text }} {{markup|title=Including {{tag|br|s}} parses the bullet markup, but adds a blank line |
* Text |
* Text }} {{markup|title=Using {{tl|crlf2}} parses the bullet markup without extra white space |{{crlf2}} * Text |{{crlf2}} * Text }} == See also == {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Line-handling templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] {{wikidata link||no|Mal:Crlf2}}
